# Android Gradle wrapper not yet generated. Open this folder in Android Studio
# (Hedgehog or newer) once; Android Studio offers to generate gradle/wrapper/* automatically.
# Alternatively run `gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.10` (requires global Gradle 8.10+).

#   app/src/main/res/mipmap-*/ic_launcher.* (auto-generated by Android Studio image asset wizard)
